AcceptDirectConnectGatewayAssociationPro.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role to accept the Direct Connect Gateway association proposal. Needs directconnect:AcceptDirectConnectGatewayAssociationProposal permissions.
AcceptDirectConnectGatewayAssociationPro.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role to accept the Direct Connect Gateway association proposal. Needs directconnect:AcceptDirectConnectGatewayAssociationProposal permissions.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z-]*:iam::[0-9]{12}:role/.+$  
Update requires: Replacement

DirectConnectGatewayId.description: The ID or ARN of the Direct Connect gateway.
DirectConnectGatewayId.markdownDescription:
The ID or ARN of the Direct Connect gateway.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws[a-z-]*:directconnect::[0-9]{12}:dx-gateway/)?[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: Replacement

AssociatedGatewayId.description: The ID or ARN of the virtual private gateway or transit gateway.
AssociatedGatewayId.markdownDescription:
The ID or ARN of the virtual private gateway or transit gateway.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^((arn:aws[a-z-]*:ec2:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:(vpn-gateway/vgw|transit-gateway/tgw))|(vgw|tgw))-[a-zA-Z0-9]{8,32}$  
Update requires: Replacement

AllowedPrefixesToDirectConnectGateway.description: The Amazon VPC prefixes to advertise to the Direct Connect gateway. This parameter is required when you create an association to a transit gateway.

items.description: A CIDR block for the advertised route. An IPv6 CIDR must use /64 or shorter.
items.markdownDescription:
A CIDR block for the advertised route. An IPv6 CIDR must use /64 or shorter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-fA-F:.]+/[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

AllowedPrefixesToDirectConnectGateway.markdownDescription:
The Amazon VPC prefixes to advertise to the Direct Connect gateway. This parameter is required when you create an association to a transit gateway.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

AssociationId.description: The ID of the Direct Connect gateway association.
AssociationId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Direct Connect gateway association.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

AssociationId.description: The ID of the Direct Connect gateway association.
AssociationId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the Direct Connect gateway association.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
